/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ar qc libsolvers.a CMakeFiles/solvers.dir/MIPSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solvers.dir/ISUDAlgorithm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solvers.dir/CPLEXSubProblem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solvers.dir/ReducedProblem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solvers.dir/ComplementPro.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solvers.dir/MasterModeler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solvers.dir/LabelingSubProblem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solvers.dir/SubproModeler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solvers.dir/ZoomReducedProblem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solvers.dir/GreedyModeler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/solvers.dir/solver.cpp.o
/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ranlib libsolvers.a
